opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I can't stay off the toilet, and I'm vomiting everything I try to drink. I feel completely drained.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Sudden vomiting and watery diarrhoea for hours and I can't keep fluids down.

symptom_narrative.character: crampy diffuse abdominal pain, frequent watery non-bloody diarrhoea, nausea and non-bilious vomiting, malaise/myalgia
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: can't stay off the toilet, vomiting everything, drained
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: frequent, cramps ease after passing stool
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: mild fever earlier, myalgia; NO blood in stool, no severe constant or right-lower-quadrant pain, no recent travel

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; can't retain fluids; ORS available

objective_data_offered.value: frequent watery non-bloody diarrhoea + vomiting; crampy tummy easing after stool
feels drained; can't keep fluids down; not yet very lightheaded
